name: llama.cpp
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ggml-org /

      llama.cpp  

    
      LLM inference in C/C++
summary: llama.cpp 是一个用C/C++实现的高性能大语言模型推理引擎，因其能在消费级硬件上高效运行Llama等模型而备受关注。

name: codegraph
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        colbymchenry /

      codegraph  

    
      Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
summary: CodeGraph 是一个为 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等 AI 编程工具预建索引的本地代码知识图谱，能显著减少 Token 消耗和工具调用次数，值得关注因为它大幅提升 AI 编码效率且完全本地运行。

name: openhuman
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        tinyhumansai /

      openhuman  

    
      Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
summary: OpenHuman 是一个用 Rust 构建的个人AI超级智能助手，主打隐私、简洁与强大性能，值得关注因为它将AI能力完全本地化，兼顾了数据安全与高效运行。

name: rohitg00
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        rohitg00 /

      ai-engineering-from-scratch  

    
      Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
summary: 该项目是一个从零开始学习AI工程的开源教程，涵盖理论、实践与项目部署，适合想系统掌握AI工程全流程的开发者。

name: oh-my-pi
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        can1357 /

      oh-my-pi  

    
      ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
summary: 该项目是一个终端AI编程助手，支持哈希锚定编辑、LSP、Python、浏览器和子代理等功能，因其高效的工具链和强大的扩展性值得关注。

name: msitarzewski
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        msitarzewski /

      agency-agents  

    
      A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
summary: 该项目是一个“全能AI代理机构”，集成了从前端开发到社交媒体运营等各类专业AI代理，每个代理都具备独特个性和可交付成果，值得关注因为它将多种AI角色整合为即用型工具，极大简化了自动化工作流。

name: opentoonz
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        opentoonz /

      opentoonz  

    
      OpenToonz - An open-source full-featured 2D animation creation software
summary: OpenToonz 是一款开源的全功能2D动画制作软件，因其被吉卜力工作室等专业团队使用且功能强大、完全免费而值得关注。

          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        rohitg00 /

      agentmemory  

    
      #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks
summary: 该项目是一个基于真实世界基准测试的AI编程代理持久化记忆库，值得关注是因为它解决了AI代理在长期任务中记忆丢失的核心痛点。
